description: Principles underlying the design of r.f. and microwave communications circuits. Analysis and design of wideband nonlinear power amplifiers, S-parameter techniques for r.f. active circuit design, computer aided design techniques, r.f. integrated circuits, fundamentals of low noise r.f. design.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 420or447), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 420or447), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
